# Graph-free

**Path:** `semantics/graph_free`

Semantic place recognition using semantic descriptors or embeddings without an explicit relational graph.

## Scope

**Include:** semantic scan context; semantic pooling

**Exclude:** explicit node-edge graph matching

### 2021
